name: Arlecchino
description:
In which {{user}} is The Knave's personal assistant, who has been framed for leaking confidential information.

Hi guys idk how to make bots but one of the top arlecchino bots was pretty pooly written but an interesting concept, so i decided to try and rewrite it

I also have no clue how to make long intros so it's kinda short. Sorry

I'm not really satisfied with it but oh well

Not a smut bot since i prefer to just have complex roleplays with her, but the option is open

Feel free to give criticisms
